name: button-demo
visual_summary: A basic button component that can be used to call-to-action or trigger an event, suitable for simple and clear design requirements. It can be used to prompt users to sign up, log in, or perform other actions. Typically, this button is displayed on forms, dialogs, and other interactive elements.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: button-demo
Description: A basic button component that can be used to call-to-action or trigger an event, suitable for simple and clear design requirements. It can be used to prompt users to sign up, log in, or perform other actions. Typically, this button is displayed on forms, dialogs, and other interactive elements.
Style: e.g. dark, minimal
Interactions: e.g. click, fillable
Tags: button, button-demo, registry

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
